notes: Global payment-card network. Publishes multiple security programs that issuers, acquirers, and merchants must follow as part of network participation: Visa Core Rules (master document), AIS (Account Information Security Program, the Visa precursor to PCI DSS), PIN Security Requirements, P2PE attestation, Visa Threat Intelligence. Materials are restricted to participants/merchants under network agreements.

data.notes: Network-participant restricted. AIS is Visa's program that pre-dated and is now aligned with PCI DSS.

match_nodes.description: Visa Core Rules and Visa Product and Service Rules

data.official_name: Visa Core Rules and Visa Product and Service Rules
data.notes: Network-participant restricted. Comprehensive operating rules including security requirements for participants.
